items.name: chain 💎
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .

items.name: Heavy Juggernaut Combat Helmet - Black
items.description:
More recolor in the group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/50422001/Osu-Corp#!/about
Made With Ema123
The D1-VANGUARD division presents the "Titan" helmet — designed for the operative who considers a direct hit a minor workplace inconvenience. This military-grade ballistic shell features an integrated triple-lens recon sensor array, reinforced armored plating, and high-impact filtration canisters, built for the toxin-filled warzones of the lower sectors. Whether you're a frontline juggernaut or spec-ops scout, wear it for the protection; keep it for the silhouette that says, "I'm here to finish the job and clock out early."
